title: Update tests to remove workspace_root expectations
summary: Revise unit/integration tests to reflect removal of workspace_root from config and runtime flows while preserving coverage targets.
acceptance_criteria: All tests referencing workspace_root are removed or updated.
Test expectations align with host working directory behavior.
No test failures caused by the removal of workspace_root.

steps.description: Identify tests asserting workspace_root presence or propagation.
Update or remove those tests to match new config/runtime behavior.
Add/adjust tests to validate defaults without workspace_root.

notes: Keep changes minimal and focused on workspace_root removal.
